meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Ham Radio Village - Tyler Gardner  - Single Board Computers In Amateur Radio
meta.description: Have you ever tried Raspberry Pi and Ham together? It's a surprisingly good combination. In this talk, learn about how Raspberry Pis (and other single-board computers) play with ham radio.
